---
title: "The Document List Toolbar"
---

---
title: "The Document List Toolbar"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Capture/trx1646248502011"
section: "Hyland Capture"
---

The Document List toolbar, located at the top of the page, enables you to view the batch identification number, and navigate between documents.

The following table summarizes the elements inside the Document List toolbar:

![](data:image/gif;base64,)

![](data:image/gif;base64,)

![](data:image/gif;base64,)

![](data:image/gif;base64,)

![](data:image/gif;base64,)

| Toolbar Element | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Doc ID | Displays the identification number of the selected document. |
|  | Displays the first document in the batch. |
|  | Displays the previous document in the batch. |
| <Current document>/<Total number of documents> | Type the number of the page where you want to navigate. |
|  | Displays the next document in the batch. |
|  | Displays the last document in the batch. |
|  | Collapses the Document List and displays it as a vertical bar on the left. |
